title: Near-Infrared Fluorescence Imaging in Humans with Indocyanine Green: A Review and Update.
author: Marshall MV Rasmussen JC Tan IC Aldrich MB Adams KE Wang X Fife CE Maus EA Smith LA Sevick-Muraca EM
content: S-EPMC3424734 PMC3424734 Near-Infrared Fluorescence Imaging in Humans with Indocyanine Green: A Review and Update. Near-infrared (NIR) fluorescence imaging clinical studies have been reported in the literature with six different devices that employ various doses of indocyanine green (ICG
